\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classSommerfeldIntegrator}{Sommerfeld\+Integrator}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Numerical engine for Sommerfeld integrals in stratified media. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Declaration of the \doxylink{classSommerfeldIntegrator}{Sommerfeld\+Integrator} class, which evaluates Sommerfeld-\/type integrals for layered media Green\textquotesingle{}s functions. 

The class provides\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Path selection and data packing for semi-\/ellipse, real-\/inf, and imag-\/inf contours.
\item Intra-\//inter-\/layer integrand assembly (TE/\+TM, field/derivative/surface terms).
\item Numerical integration with singularity subtraction (Chew, W.\+C., Tong, M.\+S., Hu, B. (2009), Chapter 6).
\item Interpolation helpers to compact results for later evaluation.
\end{DoxyItemize}

Types like \doxylink{structData2D}{Data2D}/\doxylink{structData3D}{Data3D}, \doxylink{structIntegrandIntra}{Integrand\+Intra}/\doxylink{structIntegrandInter}{Integrand\+Inter}, and \doxylink{structCoeffsIntra}{Coeffs\+Intra}/\doxylink{structCoeffsInter}{Coeffs\+Inter} are defined in headers included transitively (e.\+g., \doxylink{LayeredMediaUtils_8h}{Layered\+Media\+Utils.\+h}). 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SommerfeldIntegrator_8h_source}{Sommerfeld\+Integrator.\+h}}.
